name: ImageComboBox
summary: The ImageComboBox class represents a combo box control that can contain images.

constructors.name: ImageComboBox
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ImageComboBox class.

properties.name: DefaultValue
properties.summary: Gets or sets the default value in the image combo box.

properties.name: OptionList
properties.summary: Gets or sets the elements of the option list, the images that are in the image combo box.

properties.name: SelectedIndex
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected index of the image in the image combo box.

properties.name: SelectedItem
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected image in the image combo box.

events.name: ImageCBSelectedIndexChanged
events.summary: The ImageCBSelectedIndexChanged event is triggered just after the selected index has been changed in the image combo box.
